name: Crazy Christmas Fun 2
description: This Christmas eve and all the presents have fallen out of his sleigh. In this holiday Christmas adventure game, many balloons have invaded the North Pole, and Santa must run to catch the gifts. But Santa changed his sleigh, and he is now fast and furious! He and his reindeer need your help! Your task is to fly through the sky dodging obstacles and collecting gifts. Once you reach the Christmas tree you will level up! Have Fun! The Version 2 (Crazy Christmas Fun 2) game has easier and well-managed levels which make the game more involving and Funnier!
